title: Training with Kyle: Ride #2 7:16 83.43 Miles 8,186 Feet climbing

enrichment.summary: Kyle recounts his second cycling ride of the year — an ~87-mile, 8,000+ foot climbing route from Boulder through Lyons, Estes Park, and Ward. He covers his physical struggles (asthma for the first 2.5 hours, significant left knee and hip tendon pain), gear notes (GPS computer glitch splitting the ride, radar issues, AirPods), and basic nutrition strategy (GU packets, Cytomax, one water refill stop).
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Accepts he is badly out of shape and treats early suffering as expected growing pains
Rationing remaining Advair due to lack of health insurance; prefers not to use it unless absolutely necessary
Strongly endorses them as the key to never bonking on long rides
Regrets buying AirPods over wired earphones; wind noise is a real safety problem
Loves it when it works; considers it an important safety tool
